title: Upper bound for the total mean curvature of spin fill-ins
abstract: Gromov conjectured that the total mean curvature of the boundary of a compact Riemannian manifold can be estimated from above by a constant depending only on the boundary metric and on a lower bound for the scalar curvature of the fill-in. We prove Gromov's conjecture if the manifolds are spin and the mean curvature is non-negative.
